name: deep-review
description: Deep Code Review for all programming languages — OWASP Top 10:2025 / CWE taint analysis (19 security checks including SSTI, JWT misuse, mass assignment, XXE, prompt injection), performance anti-patterns (13 checks including memoization, DB indexing, tree shaking, unbounded data loading, compression, transaction efficiency), concurrency issues (9 checks including goroutine leaks, floating promises, double-checked locking, thread pool exhaustion, event loop starvation), resilience/error-handling (9 checks including circuit breakers, retry backoff, timeouts, partial failure handling, destructive wrapping), API design (9 checks including GraphQL anti-patterns, rate limiting, sensitive data exposure, error format consistency, request validation), testing quality (9 checks including conditional test logic, test interdependency, flaky patterns, snapshot misuse, test double overuse), maintainability (9 checks including feature envy, data clumps, long parameter lists, code duplication, message chains / Law of Demeter), and architecture (9 checks including dependency inversion violations, unstable dependencies, god packages, anemic domain models, hardcoded configuration). 76 checks across 8 categories. 8 specialized Sonnet agents running in parallel, synthesized by an Opus Critic-Agent with confidence scoring (0-100) and false-positive filtering.
